chat: Thanks—so this started this morning and it’s a sharp, one-sided pain about 6/10 that’s tender to touch and worse with deep breaths or movement. Any shortness of breath, cough, fever, leg swelling, or have you had any recent injury, heavy lifting, or long travel?

I’m not really short of breath, it just hurts more when I take a deep breath, and I haven’t had a cough or fever. No leg swelling and no long trips lately—though I did help a friend move some boxes yesterday, so maybe I pulled something? I didn’t have any accident or get hit in the chest.
